title: Google Maps / Street View enrichment (English + Swedish parity)
description: The google_maps knob and its intent gates (src/googlemaps-text.js), EN+SV per invariant 6. A street-view / map ask should capture Street View and map imagery and fold it into the answer as embeds. The Swedish 'gatuvy' point guards the parity gate.

points.label: Street view (English): imagery embed appears
points.summary: With the Maps knob ON, a street-view ask for a well-known place should capture a Street View frame and show it as an embed in the reply. PASS = a Street View image + place description; FAIL = a text-only answer with no imagery.

actions.text: Turn Google Maps ON first (this point tests that gate), then send.
Show me the street view of the Eiffel Tower

points.label: Gatuvy (Swedish): parity gate fires
points.summary: The Swedish 'gatuvy' phrasing must trigger the SAME Street View capture as English (invariant 6 parity). PASS = a Street View embed; FAIL = a plain answer, meaning the Swedish maps gate regressed.

actions.text: Maps ON, then send the Swedish ask.
Visa gatuvy av Turning Torso i Malmö
